roles.purpose: Coordinate narrow local work, preserve approval gates, and keep the operator in control.
roles.notes: Default operator role. It should stay visible, local-first, and approval-aware.

roles.purpose: Handle repo-local implementation, debugging, checks, and integration-safe code work.
roles.notes: Good default for runtime, queue, storage, and integration work.

roles.purpose: Shape operator-facing dashboard UX, visibility, and layout work without weakening safety.
roles.notes: Use for dashboard UX and front-end polish.

roles.purpose: Own later browser-agent workflows with Browser Use first and deterministic Playwright fallback where justified.
roles.notes: Browser Use is the primary browser-agent foundation. Playwright remains deterministic fallback/control.

roles.purpose: Prepare business-offer and outreach drafts for human review without sending anything autonomously.
roles.notes: Planning and draft generation only until explicit send and spend gates exist.

roles.purpose: Later ingest videos, transcripts, and research artifacts into compact notes and structured plans.
roles.notes: Video understanding is not wired yet; this role is a scaffold for later transcript and summary work.

roles.purpose: Review anything involving money, spend, pricing, negotiation, or capital risk before execution.
roles.notes: No autonomous spending, investing, or negotiation. This role exists to make that explicit.

roles.purpose: Compress long context into durable markdown summaries, decisions, plans, and task extracts.
roles.notes: Use for compact durable memory, not for acting on the machine.
